backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend, implementing user profiles, chart analysis storage/retrieval, user settings, Gemini API key management, and daily operation limit tracking, with role-based access control via AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: fixing the Settings page UI controls to be fully wired to the backend, and auditing/fixing the frontend hooks (useSettings.ts, useQueries.ts) to correctly match Motoko backend function signatures.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every component, page, and hook in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's light and dark color themes, including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Advance Signal Pro', mounting the app at the #root div and loading the Vite entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, settings) wrapped in a ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using the useCamera hook, supporting start/stop/capture/retake/switch actions with all UI text in Portuguese and localized error messages for permission, not-found, and unsupported scenarios.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based component that draws support/resistance level lines and a directional trend arrow over a chart image retrieved from sessionStorage.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: Drag-and-drop file upload component that validates image files (PNG, JPG, WebP, max 10MB), rejects HEIC/HEIF formats with a warning, and calls an `onFileSelect` callback with the chosen file.
Renders a clickable card for a past chart analysis entry, displaying the signal type (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, trend direction, and timestamp, then navigates to the results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a full-height container, renders child routes via `<Outlet>`, and includes a toast provider and a footer with a caffeine.ai attribution link.
Displays a single step in a multi-stage processing indicator, showing a spinner when active, a checkmark when complete, or an idle dot otherwise.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: Simple layout component that renders a labeled settings row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the main trading signal card with direction icon, signal label (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, trend direction badge, trend strength, and optional score badge.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Provides helpers to build the Gemini Vision API URL with the key as a query parameter and to validate the stored API key format via the backend actor.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context that manages light/dark theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and applies the theme class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that listens for paste events and extracts the first image from the clipboard, exposing it as a `File` along with any permission error.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including fetching/storing analyses, user settings, Gemini API key management, and daily operation progress.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries, exposing a unified interface for reading and updating user settings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme color tokens along with base element styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for selecting or capturing a trading chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then storing it in sessionStorage and navigating to the processing screen.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to the analyze, history, and settings pages.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Page that fetches and lists past chart analyses using useGetAnalyses, showing a loading state or an empty-state prompt when no analyses exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Displays a multi-stage processing animation while loading a chart image from session storage, validating the Gemini API key, and running chart analysis via the backend actor. Handles errors for missing API keys, 404s, and general failures with retry/settings navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Shows the analysis results page for a given ID, reading data from session storage and rendering signal direction, confidence, trend, candlestick patterns, and chart overlay. Supports sharing, saving, and displays special alerts for SEM ENTRADA or NEUTRO signals.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure the Gemini API key, AI sensitivity, default timeframe, daily operation limit, notifications, and theme. Persists changes via backend mutation hooks and displays validation feedback via toasts.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Service that sends chart images to the Gemini Vision API for technical analysis, handling MIME type detection, image preprocessing/resizing, and error wrapping via a custom AnalysisApiError class. Returns a structured ApiAnalysisResponse from the API.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the external chart analysis API response (ApiAnalysisResponse) and API errors, including the 6-step rule-based analysis contract with signal types, trend, confidence, patterns, and explanation fields.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date-time string.
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps the external Gemini API response to the internal AnalysisResult format, converting signal strings to AnalysisDirection enums, pattern strings to CandlestickPattern enums, and generating mock resistance levels. Preserves the original signal and score for UI display.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Utility that shares a formatted analysis summary text using the Web Share API, falling back to clipboard copy or a textarea execCommand approach for older browsers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/radius values, accordion animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing Advance Signal Pro, a mobile financial chart analysis app using Gemini Vision API, including architecture notes, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata.
